title: difficulty_daily history file
description: P1 backfill portion is a sparse step function (one row per retarget change). From P2 onward, fetch_snapshot.py appends one row per calendar day (repeating the same value between retargets), so later portions of this series are dense.

carried_forward.description: True only when this row's value was carried forward from the prior day after every source in the failover chain failed or was rejected this run -- not a fresh observation. Absent (or false) on every freshly-fetched row.
